transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Let's go through the sales pipeline. How are we looking for Q3?
[00:30] Speaker 1: Acme Corp is close. I'll send the final contract by end of day today.
[01:00] Speaker 2: I have two demos scheduled next week. I'll follow up with both prospects after the demos and send proposals by July 5th.
[01:45] You: What about the GlobalTech deal we lost?
[02:00] Speaker 1: I'll schedule a debrief call with the GlobalTech team to understand why we lost. I'll do that by Monday, June 29th.
[02:45] Speaker 2: I'll update our CRM with all the pipeline changes from this meeting before EOD.
[03:15] You: We need to hit 120% of quota by end of Q3. Let's align on that target.
[03:30] Speaker 1: Agreed. That's our target.

action_items.description: Send final contract to Acme Corp
action_items.source_quote: I'll send the final contract by end of day today.

action_items.description: Send proposals to two demo prospects
action_items.source_quote: I'll follow up with both prospects after the demos and send proposals by July 5th.

action_items.description: Schedule debrief call with GlobalTech team
action_items.source_quote: I'll schedule a debrief call with the GlobalTech team to understand why we lost. I'll do that by Monday, June 29th.

action_items.description: Update CRM with pipeline changes from this meeting
action_items.source_quote: I'll update our CRM with all the pipeline changes from this meeting before EOD.
